svg.aria-label: Choropleth map of North Carolina's 2025 primary care clinician index by county, diverging at the 1500 to 1 benchmark. Purple counties beat the benchmark; orange counties (mostly the rural northeast) fall short.
svg.title: NC primary care clinician index vs 1500:1, 2025
svg.desc: Purple = better than 1500:1, orange = worse. Most urban/Piedmont counties beat the benchmark; the rural northeast falls short.
